predicate_mappings.evs_assignment_active: the evs assignment for {} is active
predicate_mappings.initial_cleaning_completed: the initial cleaning for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.clinical_signoff_scheduled: a clinical signoff is scheduled for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.clinical_signoff_present: a clinical signoff is present for {}

predicate_mappings.tablet_pairing_available: tablet pairing is available for {} with {}

register_bed_for_turnover.description: register a bed unit A for turnover
preconditions: I can only register a bed unit A for turnover if it is not the case that A is a registered bed and it is not the case that A is ready for a patient
effects: Once I register a bed unit A for turnover, it is the case that A is a registered bed

assign_evs_technician_to_bed.description: assign an evs technician B to a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only assign an evs technician B to a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and B is an available evs technician and B is eligible for A
I can only assign an evs technician B to a bed unit A if it is not the case that the evs assignment for A is active
effects: Once I assign an evs technician B to a bed unit A, it is the case that A is assigned to B and the evs assignment for A is active
Once I assign an evs technician B to a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available evs technician

release_evs_assignment.description: release evs assignment of an evs technician B from a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only release evs assignment of an evs technician B from a bed unit A if it is the case that A is assigned to B
I can only release evs assignment of an evs technician B from a bed unit A if it is not the case that a clinical signoff is present for A and it is not the case that an audit has been initiated for A
effects: Once I release evs assignment of an evs technician B from a bed unit A, it is the case that B is an available evs technician

Once I release evs assignment of an evs technician B from a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that the evs assignment for A is active and it is not the case anymore that the initial cleaning for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that the inspection for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit used A and it is not the case anymore that cleaning sequence complete A and it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A

attach_cleaning_cart_to_bed.description: attach a cleaning cart B to a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only attach a cleaning cart B to a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and B is an available cleaning cart
effects: Once I attach a cleaning cart B to a bed unit A, it is the case that B is attached to A
Once I attach a cleaning cart B to a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available cleaning cart

detach_cleaning_cart_from_bed.description: detach a cleaning cart B from a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only detach a cleaning cart B from a bed unit A if it is the case that B is attached to A
effects: Once I detach a cleaning cart B from a bed unit A, it is the case that B is an available cleaning cart
Once I detach a cleaning cart B from a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to A

mark_initial_cleaning_completed.description: mark initial cleaning for a bed unit A as completed using a cleaning cart B
preconditions: I can only mark initial cleaning for a bed unit A as completed using a cleaning cart B if it is the case that A is a registered bed and the evs assignment for A is active and B is attached to A
I can only mark initial cleaning for a bed unit A as completed using a cleaning cart B if it is not the case that the initial cleaning for A is completed
effects: Once I mark initial cleaning for a bed unit A as completed using a cleaning cart B, it is the case that the initial cleaning for A is completed

use_portable_cleaning_kit.description: use a portable cleaning kit B for initial cleaning of a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only use a portable cleaning kit B for initial cleaning of a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and the evs assignment for A is active and portable cleaning kit available B
I can only use a portable cleaning kit B for initial cleaning of a bed unit A if it is not the case that the initial cleaning for A is completed
effects: Once I use a portable cleaning kit B for initial cleaning of a bed unit A, it is the case that the initial cleaning for A is completed and portable cleaning kit used A
Once I use a portable cleaning kit B for initial cleaning of a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit available B

complete_local_inspection_with_checklist.description: complete local inspection of a bed unit A using a checklist form C and a cleaning cart B
preconditions: I can only complete local inspection of a bed unit A using a checklist form C and a cleaning cart B if it is the case that the initial cleaning for A is completed and the evs assignment for A is active and B is attached to A and checklist form available C
I can only complete local inspection of a bed unit A using a checklist form C and a cleaning cart B if it is not the case that the inspection for A is completed
effects: Once I complete local inspection of a bed unit A using a checklist form C and a cleaning cart B, it is the case that the inspection for A is completed
Once I complete local inspection of a bed unit A using a checklist form C and a cleaning cart B, it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit used A

use_audit_tablet_inspection.description: use an audit tablet B for inspection of a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only use an audit tablet B for inspection of a bed unit A if it is the case that the evs assignment for A is active and tablet assigned A B
I can only use an audit tablet B for inspection of a bed unit A if it is not the case that the inspection for A is completed
effects: Once I use an audit tablet B for inspection of a bed unit A, it is the case that the inspection for A is completed
Once I use an audit tablet B for inspection of a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit used A

allocate_linen_cart_to_bed.description: allocate a linen cart B to a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only allocate a linen cart B to a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and B is an available linen cart and linen cart compatible A B
effects: Once I allocate a linen cart B to a bed unit A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate a linen cart B to a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available linen cart

release_linen_cart_from_bed.description: release a linen cart B from a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only release a linen cart B from a bed unit A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release a linen cart B from a bed unit A, it is the case that B is an available linen cart
Once I release a linen cart B from a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

allocate_cleaning_protocol_to_bed.description: allocate a cleaning protocol B to a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only allocate a cleaning protocol B to a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and B is an available cleaning protocol and protocol applicable A B
effects: Once I allocate a cleaning protocol B to a bed unit A, it is the case that B is applied to A
Once I allocate a cleaning protocol B to a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available cleaning protocol

release_cleaning_protocol_from_bed.description: release a cleaning protocol B from a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only release a cleaning protocol B from a bed unit A if it is the case that B is applied to A
effects: Once I release a cleaning protocol B from a bed unit A, it is the case that B is an available cleaning protocol
Once I release a cleaning protocol B from a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is applied to A

allocate_disinfectant_kit_to_bed.description: allocate a disinfectant kit B to a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only allocate a disinfectant kit B to a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and B is an available disinfectant kit and disinfectant kit compatible A B
effects: Once I allocate a disinfectant kit B to a bed unit A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate a disinfectant kit B to a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available disinfectant kit

release_disinfectant_kit_from_bed.description: release a disinfectant kit B from a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only release a disinfectant kit B from a bed unit A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release a disinfectant kit B from a bed unit A, it is the case that B is an available disinfectant kit
Once I release a disinfectant kit B from a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

allocate_uv_unit_to_bed.description: allocate an uv disinfection unit B to a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only allocate an uv disinfection unit B to a bed unit A if it is the case that A is a registered bed and uv unit available B and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I allocate an uv disinfection unit B to a bed unit A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate an uv disinfection unit B to a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that uv unit available B

release_uv_unit_from_bed.description: release an uv disinfection unit B from a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only release an uv disinfection unit B from a bed unit A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release an uv disinfection unit B from a bed unit A, it is the case that uv unit available B
Once I release an uv disinfection unit B from a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

assign_charge_nurse_for_signoff.description: assign a charge nurse B for signoff on a bed unit A with a linen cart C and a cleaning protocol D
preconditions: I can only assign a charge nurse B for signoff on a bed unit A with a linen cart C and a cleaning protocol D if it is the case that the evs assignment for A is active and C is allocated to A and D is applied to A and B is an available charge nurse and B is responsible for A
I can only assign a charge nurse B for signoff on a bed unit A with a linen cart C and a cleaning protocol D if it is not the case that a clinical signoff is present for A
effects: Once I assign a charge nurse B for signoff on a bed unit A with a linen cart C and a cleaning protocol D, it is the case that a clinical signoff is scheduled for A with B and a clinical signoff is present for A
Once I assign a charge nurse B for signoff on a bed unit A with a linen cart C and a cleaning protocol D, it is not the case anymore that B is an available charge nurse

perform_infection_control_audit.description: perform infection control audit on a bed unit A with a charge nurse B, a disinfectant kit C, and a safety equipment D
preconditions: I can only perform infection control audit on a bed unit A with a charge nurse B, a disinfectant kit C, and a safety equipment D if it is the case that the evs assignment for A is active and C is allocated to A and safety equipment available D and B is an available charge nurse and B is responsible for A and safety equipment required A D
I can only perform infection control audit on a bed unit A with a charge nurse B, a disinfectant kit C, and a safety equipment D if it is not the case that a clinical signoff is present for A
effects: Once I perform infection control audit on a bed unit A with a charge nurse B, a disinfectant kit C, and a safety equipment D, it is the case that a clinical signoff is scheduled for A with B and a clinical signoff is present for A and remediation is required for A and portable cleaning kit used A

Once I perform infection control audit on a bed unit A with a charge nurse B, a disinfectant kit C, and a safety equipment D, it is not the case anymore that B is an available charge nurse and it is not the case anymore that safety equipment available D

resolve_remediation_requirement.description: resolve remediation requirement for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C
preconditions: I can only resolve remediation requirement for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C if it is the case that a clinical signoff is present for A and remediation is required for A and B is allocated to A and C is applied to A
effects: Once I resolve remediation requirement for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C, it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A and it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit used A

initiate_governance_audit.description: initiate governance audit for a bed unit A with a linen cart B, a cleaning protocol C, and a turnover team member D
preconditions: I can only initiate governance audit for a bed unit A with a linen cart B, a cleaning protocol C, and a turnover team member D if it is the case that the inspection for A is completed and a clinical signoff is present for A and B is allocated to A and C is applied to A and turnover team link A D

I can only initiate governance audit for a bed unit A with a linen cart B, a cleaning protocol C, and a turnover team member D if it is not the case that portable cleaning kit used A and it is not the case that an audit has been initiated for A
effects: Once I initiate governance audit for a bed unit A with a linen cart B, a cleaning protocol C, and a turnover team member D, it is the case that an audit has been initiated for A

initiate_infection_control_governance_au.description: initiate infection control governance audit for a bed unit A with a disinfectant kit B, an uv disinfection unit C, and an infection control rep D
preconditions: I can only initiate infection control governance audit for a bed unit A with a disinfectant kit B, an uv disinfection unit C, and an infection control rep D if it is the case that the inspection for A is completed and a clinical signoff is present for A and B is allocated to A and C is allocated to A and turnover team link A D

I can only initiate infection control governance audit for a bed unit A with a disinfectant kit B, an uv disinfection unit C, and an infection control rep D if it is not the case that an audit has been initiated for A
effects: Once I initiate infection control governance audit for a bed unit A with a disinfectant kit B, an uv disinfection unit C, and an infection control rep D, it is the case that an audit has been initiated for A and portable cleaning kit used A

complete_governance_and_prepare_for_fina.description: complete governance and prepare for final check for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C
preconditions: I can only complete governance and prepare for final check for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C if it is the case that an audit has been initiated for A and portable cleaning kit used A and B is allocated to A and C is applied to A
effects: Once I complete governance and prepare for final check for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C, it is the case that cleaning sequence complete A

Once I complete governance and prepare for final check for a bed unit A using a linen cart B and a cleaning protocol C, it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit used A and it is not the case anymore that the inspection for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that remediation is required for A

perform_followup_local_inspection.description: perform follow up local inspection for a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C
preconditions: I can only perform follow up local inspection for a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C if it is the case that cleaning sequence complete A and an audit has been initiated for A and the evs assignment for A is active and B is attached to A and checklist form available C
I can only perform follow up local inspection for a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C if it is not the case that the inspection for A is completed
effects: Once I perform follow up local inspection for a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C, it is the case that the inspection for A is completed

mark_ready_for_audit_with_cart.description: mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a cleaning cart B
preconditions: I can only mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a cleaning cart B if it is the case that an audit has been initiated for A and the inspection for A is completed and B is attached to A
I can only mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a cleaning cart B if it is not the case that portable cleaning kit used A and it is not the case that A is ready for audit
effects: Once I mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a cleaning cart B, it is the case that A is ready for audit

mark_ready_for_audit_with_portable_kit.description: mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a portable cleaning kit B
preconditions: I can only mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a portable cleaning kit B if it is the case that an audit has been initiated for A and the inspection for A is completed and portable cleaning kit available B
I can only mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a portable cleaning kit B if it is not the case that portable cleaning kit used A and it is not the case that A is ready for audit
effects: Once I mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a portable cleaning kit B, it is the case that A is ready for audit
Once I mark a bed unit A ready for audit with a portable cleaning kit B, it is not the case anymore that portable cleaning kit available B

reserve_audit_tablet_for_bed.description: reserve an audit tablet B for a bed unit A
preconditions: I can only reserve an audit tablet B for a bed unit A if it is the case that A is ready for audit and audit tablet available B and tablet pairing is available for A with B
effects: Once I reserve an audit tablet B for a bed unit A, it is the case that tablet reserved for bed A B
Once I reserve an audit tablet B for a bed unit A, it is not the case anymore that audit tablet available B

supervisor_assign_reserved_tablet_to_iso.description: assign reserved an audit tablet C to a bed subtype b A from a bed subtype a bed subtype a B
preconditions: I can only assign reserved an audit tablet C to a bed subtype b A from a bed subtype a bed subtype a B if it is the case that A is a registered bed and A is a subtype b bed and tablet compatible with bed A C and tablet reserved for bed B C
I can only assign reserved an audit tablet C to a bed subtype b A from a bed subtype a bed subtype a B if it is not the case that tablet assigned A C
effects: Once I assign reserved an audit tablet C to a bed subtype b A from a bed subtype a bed subtype a B, it is the case that tablet assigned A C

record_supervisor_signoff_on_bed.description: record supervisor signoff on a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C
preconditions: I can only record supervisor signoff on a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C if it is the case that A is a registered bed and A is a subtype b bed and the inspection for A is completed and A is ready for audit and B is attached to A and checklist form available C
I can only record supervisor signoff on a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C if it is not the case that supervisor signoff recorded A
effects: Once I record supervisor signoff on a bed unit A using a cleaning cart B and a checklist form C, it is the case that supervisor signoff recorded A

finalize_bed_ready_standard.description: finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient
preconditions: I can only finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient if it is the case that A is a subtype a bed and A is a registered bed and the evs assignment for A is active and a clinical signoff is present for A and an audit has been initiated for A and A is ready for audit and the inspection for A is completed
I can only finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient if it is not the case that A is ready for a patient
effects: Once I finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient, it is the case that A is ready for a patient

finalize_bed_ready_with_tablet.description: finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient using an audit tablet B
preconditions: I can only finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient using an audit tablet B if it is the case that A is a subtype b bed and A is a registered bed and the evs assignment for A is active and a clinical signoff is present for A and an audit has been initiated for A and A is ready for audit and the inspection for A is completed and tablet assigned A B
I can only finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient using an audit tablet B if it is not the case that A is ready for a patient
effects: Once I finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient using an audit tablet B, it is the case that A is ready for a patient

finalize_bed_ready_alternate.description: finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient with supervisor signoff
preconditions: I can only finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient with supervisor signoff if it is the case that A is a subtype b bed and A is a registered bed and the evs assignment for A is active and a clinical signoff is present for A and an audit has been initiated for A and A is ready for audit and the inspection for A is completed and supervisor signoff recorded A
I can only finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient with supervisor signoff if it is not the case that A is ready for a patient
effects: Once I finalize a bed unit A as ready for a patient with supervisor signoff, it is the case that A is ready for a patient

action_nl_templates.release_evs_assignment: release evs assignment of evs technician {?evs_technician} from bed unit {?bed_unit}

action_nl_templates.detach_cleaning_cart_from_bed: detach cleaning cart {?cleaning_cart} from bed unit {?bed_unit}

action_nl_templates.release_linen_cart_from_bed: release linen cart {?linen_cart} from bed unit {?bed_unit}
action_nl_templates.allocate_cleaning_protocol_to_bed: allocate cleaning protocol {?cleaning_protocol} to bed unit {?bed_unit}
action_nl_templates.release_cleaning_protocol_from_bed: release cleaning protocol {?cleaning_protocol} from bed unit {?bed_unit}

action_nl_templates.release_disinfectant_kit_from_bed: release disinfectant kit {?disinfectant_kit} from bed unit {?bed_unit}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a physical entity is also a object

Everything that is a bed unit or a evs technician or a charge nurse or a cleaning protocol or a linen cart or a disinfectant kit or a cleaning cart or a portable cleaning kit or a audit tablet or a checklist form or a safety equipment or a uv disinfection unit or a personnel group is also a physical entity
Everything that is a turnover team member or a infection control rep is also a personnel group
Everything that is a bed subtype a or a bed subtype b is also a bed unit
